arts.ttl: Tottenham to battle Arsenal, Chelsea for £83m-rated Borussia Dortmund star?
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are reportedly preparing to engage in a transfer battle with Arsenal and Chelsea in a bid to sign a Borussia Dortmund attacker.

arts.ttl: Preview: Borussia Dortmund vs. Sporting Lisbon - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Wednesday's Champions League clash between Borussia Dortmund and Sporting Lisbon, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Dortmund want £85m for Gittens - Tuesday's gossip
arts.sum: Jamie Gittens could cost Premier League clubs £85m, Manchester United hit a snag in their Victor Osimhen pursuit and Manchester City will battle their neighbours for a young midfield talent.

arts.ttl: Geovany Quenda: Amorim favourite WANTS Man Utd amid €20m problem
arts.sum: According to Ben Jacobs, there is still a €20 million gap in valuation between Man Utd and Sporting, although the journalist has also confirmed that the youngster is interested in a switch to Old Trafford. Quenda wants Man Utd but gap in valuation remains
